message:
feat(bakeoff): enrich bead graph with implementation detail and cross-bead consistency

Bead updates (plan-space enrichment for embedding/reranker bake-off):
- bd-2crr: Add ModelCategory enum, category() trait method, convenience
  methods reranker_by_name()/embedder_by_name(), remove misleading async_trait
- bd-120: Define BenchmarkResult output struct with category, eligible,
  error_rate(), is_reliable() as bridge type consumed by report generator
- bd-ylsp: Fix API call to use registry.reranker_by_name() matching bd-2crr,
  explicitly extend existing SearchResult struct with rerank_score field
- bd-5fj3: Add WinnerMetrics::from_benchmark_result() mapping, reference
  BenchmarkResult from bd-120 explicitly, use ModelCategory from bd-2crr
- bd-32ph, bd-2ep, bd-21lt, bd-25z8, bd-p4vs, bd-3783, bd-3qov: Enriched
  with comprehensive unit tests, integration tests, and E2E scripts

Cross-bead consistency fixes:
- Registry API naming aligned (reranker_by_name vs create_reranker)
- BenchmarkResult type defined as bridge between runner and reporter
- ModelCategory flows from trait → benchmark → report
- Eligibility flag set from candidates list in benchmark, consumed in report

Also includes discovery results from prior session (embedding + reranker candidates).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
